amendments.normalized_body: Make the new trace-capture test deterministic in `tests/unit/agent_execution_test.rs:572-596`. It currently uses `#[tokio::test(flavor = "multi_thread")]` together with `tracing::subscriber::set_default(...)`, but `set_default` only installs the subscriber for the current thread. Since `service.invoke(request).await` contains await points, the future can resume on a different Tokio worker and emit `"invocation completed"` outside the test subscriber, causing intermittent failures. Use `flavor = "current_thread"` for this test or switch to a capture mechanism that applies across worker threads.
